title: HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE HOUSING AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT COUNCIL HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental assistance to low-income families through HUD's Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) program. This federally funded program provides rent subsidies that enable income-qualified participants to lease privately owned rental housing. Fields complaints about Section 8 HCV program. Also owns the 48-unit Harbeck Village apartments and the 56- unit Cathedral Square, affordable housing projects. Does not offer any emergency housing assistance. 1205 NE 7th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines. A monthly gross income chart can be viewed on agency website under "Applicants" Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 479-5529 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-5529 TDD (800) 735-2900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for more information. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPHINE HOUSING AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT COUNCIL
